assessmentObjectives.description: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of physical activity and sport
Apply knowledge and understanding of physical activity and sport
Analyse and evaluate physical activity and sport
Demonstrate and apply relevant practical skills

topics.name: The Skeletal System
topics.description: Bones, structure and functions of the skeleton

topics.name: The Muscular System
topics.description: Major muscles, antagonistic pairs, types of contraction

topics.name: Joints and Movement
topics.description: Synovial joints, types of movement at joints

topics.name: The Cardio-Respiratory System
topics.description: Pathway of air, gaseous exchange, heart structure, blood vessels

topics.name: Cardiac Output, Stroke Volume and Heart Rate
topics.description: Relationships between CO, SV and HR; heart rate graphs

topics.name: Mechanics of Breathing
topics.description: Intercostal muscles, ribs and diaphragm in breathing

topics.name: Spirometer Trace Interpretation
topics.description: Tidal volume, reserve volumes, interpreting traces

topics.name: Aerobic and Anaerobic Exercise
topics.description: Definitions, equations, EPOC/oxygen debt, recovery

topics.name: Short and Long Term Effects of Exercise
topics.description: Immediate, short-term and long-term effects on body systems

topics.name: Lever Systems
topics.description: First, second and third class levers; mechanical advantage

topics.name: Movement Analysis in Sport
topics.description: Types of movement at joints in sporting actions

topics.name: Planes and Axes of Movement
topics.description: Frontal, transverse, sagittal planes and axes in sport

topics.name: Health and Fitness
topics.description: Definitions and relationship between health and fitness

topics.name: Components of Fitness
topics.description: Definitions and sporting links for 10 components

topics.name: Fitness Testing
topics.description: Reasons, limitations and procedures for fitness tests

topics.name: Principles of Training
topics.description: SPORT and FITT principles applied to training programmes

topics.name: Training Methods
topics.description: Circuit, continuous, Fartlek, interval, weight, plyometric training

topics.name: Optimising Training and Preventing Injury
topics.description: Training zones, one rep max, injury prevention strategies

topics.name: High Altitude Training
topics.description: Physiological adaptations, benefits and limitations

topics.name: Seasonal Training
topics.description: Pre-season, competition and post-season phases

topics.name: Warm Up and Cool Down
topics.description: Constituent parts and benefits of warming up and cooling down

topics.name: Skill Classification
topics.description: Basic/complex, open/closed, gross/fine skill classifications

topics.name: Goal Setting and SMART Targets
topics.description: Performance vs outcome goals, SMART targets

topics.name: Information Processing
topics.description: Input, decision making, output and feedback model

topics.name: Guidance in Sport
topics.description: Visual, verbal, manual and mechanical guidance

topics.name: Feedback in Sport
topics.description: Types of feedback and evaluation for different performers

topics.name: Arousal and the Inverted-U Theory
topics.description: Arousal levels, inverted-U graph, stress management

topics.name: Aggression, Personality and Motivation
topics.description: Direct/indirect aggression, introvert/extrovert, motivation types

topics.name: Engagement Patterns in Sport
topics.description: Participation by gender, race, age, disability and socio-economics

topics.name: Commercialisation of Sport
topics.description: Sponsorship, media and their impacts on sport

topics.name: Technology in Sport
topics.description: Positive and negative impacts of technology on all stakeholders

topics.name: Ethics in Sport
topics.description: Etiquette, sportsmanship, gamesmanship and contract to compete

topics.name: Performance Enhancing Drugs
topics.description: Categories of PEDs, blood doping, advantages and disadvantages

topics.name: Spectator Behaviour and Hooliganism
topics.description: Effects of spectators, hooliganism causes and strategies

topics.name: Physical, Emotional and Social Health
topics.description: How participation improves physical, mental and social health

topics.name: Sedentary Lifestyle and Obesity
topics.description: Consequences of inactivity, obesity and impacts on health

topics.name: Somatotypes
topics.description: Endomorph, mesomorph and ectomorph body types in sport

topics.name: Diet and Nutrition
topics.description: Balanced diet, nutrients and their roles in performance

topics.name: Hydration and Dehydration
topics.description: Water balance, consequences of dehydration on performance
